title: Container Report - Week 22
summary:
Main
A shorter week with national holidays in many countries saw limited changes in container rates, the strongest performer was Asia to the Med, seeing some shipping lines increasing their prices per feu by up to $1,000 to take effect in the coming weeks. Donald Trump's tariffs were in the news again, partially blocked by the federal courts and then overturned the following day. Further turbulent weeks are more than likely to come.
